_comment: Intersection T/O TORA distances (metres) per runway. Sources: CYYZ from LIDO Airport Ground Charts (planner.flightsimulator.com, 2026-04-15); CYYC from Navigraph Jeppesen 10-9 chart (2026-04-15, converted from ft). Used for: (1) refining ADR to model interleaved intersection departures, (2) per-gate EXOT accuracy, (3) minimum-runway-length eligibility per aircraft type for intersection clearances, (4) future CDM plugin realistic slot differentiation. Values are TORA from that intersection to end of runway in the stated direction.
